---
title: "Jacob Anderson"

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: broadside
  image: images/jacob.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/chejj/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacob-anderson-a33b551b0/
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I’m a Data Scientist and Machine Learning Engineer specializing in applied modeling and production ML systems. For the past two years, I’ve worked in the pipeline industry, building data-driven solutions that detect cracks and corrosion before they lead to catastrophic failures. Previously, I spent three years developing DevOps workflows and software integrations for digital pathology and healthcare data systems. During two of those years, I built and trained a team of engineers before taking responsibility for managing the team and its projects.

When I’m not serving corporate overlords, you’ll usually find me playing board games, playing sports, watching movies, or traveling somewhere new. I live near Salt Lake City, Utah, with my wife and a spider who keeps finding his way back into our house.

This website is clearly a work in progress. I love my job and enjoy the work that I do, so I'm not too active about working on this site. Any and all non codes sections are written by me, but any code or work generated or edited by AI is flagged as such.
:::

::: {.home-summary}
## Experience

T.D. Williamson \| Data Scientist II \| June 2024 - Present

ASU \| Data Science / Statistics Course Assistant \| Aug 2025 - Present

Lumea \| Integrations and DevOps Software Engineer / Manager \| Feb 2021 - June 2024

NuSkin \| Tech Support (Spanish) \| Nov 2017 - Jan 2021

## Education

Arizona State University \| M.S. Biological Data Science | August 2024 - May 2026

Brigham Young University \| B.S. Applied Statistics | August 2017 - April 2024
:::
